description: Data loaded from CSV file: 206.csv (Dataset: Housing Prices Dataset)

fields.name: price
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the sale price, in whole currency units, at which individual residential properties were sold within a high-value housing market.

fields.name: area
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The 'area' field represents the size of a residential property in square feet, indicating the total floor space of homes listed in the housing prices dataset.

fields.name: bedrooms
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates the number of bedrooms in a residential property, providing a count of distinct sleeping rooms typically used to assess housing size and value in real estate listings.

fields.name: bathrooms
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the number of bathrooms in a residential property, indicating a key attribute used to describe and value homes in housing markets.

fields.name: stories
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates the number of floors (stories) in a residential property, representing its vertical structure within the housing market context.

fields.name: mainroad
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: Indicates whether a house has direct access to a main road, which may affect its accessibility and market value.

fields.name: guestroom
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: Indicates whether a house includes a dedicated guest room, specifying its availability as "yes" or "no" for each property listing.

fields.name: basement
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: Indicates whether a house has a basement, specifying the presence ("yes") or absence ("no") of this feature in a residential property.

fields.name: hotwaterheating
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates whether a house is equipped with a hot water heating system ("yes" for presence, "no" for absence), relevant to home features and amenities in housing markets.

fields.name: airconditioning
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates whether a house is equipped with air conditioning ("yes") or not ("no"), reflecting a key feature relevant to property amenities in the housing market.

fields.name: parking
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the number of parking spaces available for each housing unit, indicating the level of parking provision associated with the property.

fields.name: prefarea
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: Indicates whether a house is located in a preferred geographic area as designated by real estate or market criteria, with values denoting "yes" or "no".

fields.name: furnishingstatus
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates the level of home furnishings provided with a property—whether it is fully furnished, partially furnished, or not furnished—when it is sold or rented.

formatted_summary:
## Table 1: Housing_Prices_Dataset (545 rows × 13 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 206.csv (Dataset: Housing Prices Dataset)

### Schema (13 fields)
  - price -- type: int64, values: 1750000, 1767150, 1820000, 1855000, 1890000, ..., 10850000, 11410000, 12215000, 12250000, 13300000
  - area -- type: int64, values: 1650, 1700, 1836, 1905, 1950, ..., 12900, 12944, 13200, 15600, 16200
  - bedrooms -- type: int64, values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
  - bathrooms -- type: int64, values: 1, 2, 3, 4
  - stories -- type: int64, values: 1, 2, 3, 4
  - mainroad -- type: object, values: no, yes
  - guestroom -- type: object, values: no, yes
  - basement -- type: object, values: no, yes
  - hotwaterheating -- type: object, values: no, yes
  - airconditioning -- type: object, values: no, yes
  - parking -- type: int64, values: 0, 1, 2, 3
  - prefarea -- type: object, values: no, yes
  - furnishingstatus -- type: object, values: furnished, semi-furnished, unfurnished

2  12250000  9960         3          2        2      yes        no      yes              no              no        2      yes   semi-furnished
3  12215000  7500         4          2        2      yes        no      yes              no             yes        3      yes        furnished
